feed.title: OSCAR and JuliaLang Reading Group
feed.subtitle: University of Leeds — notes, updates, and FAQ

entry.title: Welcome to the OSCAR and JuliaLang Reading Group

link.title: Welcome to the OSCAR and JuliaLang Reading Group

entry.content:
We’re starting a reading group at the University of Leeds focused on OSCAR and JuliaLang.

This website will host:

  • session notes,
  • short updates,
  • and a growing FAQ.

If you’d like to join or suggest a topic, open an Issue in this repo with a short note about your interests.
entry.summary: We’re starting a reading group at the University of Leeds focused on OSCAR and JuliaLang.
